scripts.dev: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F }; exit 0" && concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
